creator: kris@FreeBSD.org
text:
Andrew Grillet wrote:

>> Environment:
> Cant do this. It is 7.0Beta4 on a U60 with two CPUs and two 17G SCSI disks and 2GB Ram.Install was from the Beta "install only" CD and then via FTP from the primary ftp server.
>> Description:
> Install on U60: hangs after installing all sets.
> 
> (This hardware has run earlier FBSD)
> 
> On reboot, won't boot because no kernel installed.
> 
> Top shows no active tasks apart from top and the shell.
>> How-To-Repeat:
> Three consecutive installs on U60 failed at the same place.

Verify the MD5 sum of the ISO image, it may have been corrupted during 
download.

Kris
